## Summary
Void weak lensing measures tangential shear around cosmic voids, probing underdense matter distributions to complement cluster lensing.

## Evidence
DES Year-3 detected void lensing at >10σ using ~7000 voids.

## Significance
Provides unique sensitivity to modified gravity and dark energy through growth-geometry degeneracy breaking.
